VAL-CLAW-001.summary: Transcript typed event log with 4 event types (ToolCall, LlmResponse, StateTransition, Error), append-only invariant verified, async subscriber filtering works correctly.

VAL-CLAW-002.summary: Session compaction triggers at 50-turn threshold, ResumePacket preserves decisions, active files, pending actions, constraints, and tail turns. New sessions can resume from packet.

VAL-CLAW-003.summary: Binary detection via magic bytes (ELF, PNG, JPEG, PDF, ZIP, etc.) and null byte detection. Binary files rejected by default, allowed with allow_binary=true returning base64-encoded content. Write operations properly rejected.

VAL-CLAW-004.summary: ApprovalDecayConfig with configurable decay parameters, 80% completion threshold, failure-derived out-of-scope tasks requiring approval. Standard threshold below 80%, elevated threshold above 80%.
